name: InsightReport
description: Complete bounded ephemeral analytical result and the canonical immutable payload retained by Report Snapshot.
schema_def: InsightReport {reportId, reportSchemaVersion, budgetPeriod, asOfInstant, analysisWindows[], planState, exactMetrics[], signalStates[], limitations[], sourceProvenance, policyVersions, orderingPolicyVersion, contentFingerprint}.

SourceProvenance {insightsContractVersion, budgetContractVersion, ledgerContractVersion, ledgerSnapshotId, ledgerGenerationFingerprint, budgetPlanId?, budgetPlanRevisionId?, categoryContractVersion, calculationSchemaVersion?, evidenceBindingFingerprint, analysisWindowPolicyVersion, formulaVersions[], sufficiencyVersions[], explanationVersion, orderingVersion}.

Canonical semantic payload contains every report field except derived reportId and contentFingerprint. contentFingerprint is SHA-256 over its source-generated canonical UTF-8 JSON; reportId is deterministically derived from that fingerprint and is inserted only after hashing.

Every requested metric or signal kind appears exactly once. A report contains no raw merchant description, recommendation, translation, notification, delivery state, uncited transaction payload, or historical-source reconstruction claim.
